title: DorpelingenSMP
body:
**Dorpelingen SMP – Community & Voice Chat Modpack**

------------------------------------------------------------

Dorpelingen SMP is a lightweight but refined modpack focused on playing together, communicating naturally, and creating immersive roleplay moments.  
Instead of adding huge amounts of new content, it enhances the familiar vanilla experience with stability, atmosphere, and community features.

• Proximity voice chat with Simple Voice Chat  
• Performance improvements through Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, ImmediatelyFast and similar optimizations  
• Visual polish using Iris Shaders, Complementary, BetterGrassify, Dark GUI, emissive ores and subtle HUD improvements  
• Useful quality-of-life tweaks such as JEI, a world map/minimap, improved HUD/F3, and smoother loading

------------------------------------------------------------

**Play Together Like a Real Village**

The proximity voice chat system makes communication feel natural and brings the world to life:

• Talk to neighbors only when they are close  
• Hold community gatherings and village meetings  
• Organize trading moments, events, and small group activities  
• Have private conversations at a distance  
• Experience immersive audio with Sound Physics Remastered

This creates a dynamic environment that feels lively and socially connected.

------------------------------------------------------------

**Who Is This Modpack For?**

This modpack is ideal for players who:

• Enjoy participating in a close SMP community  
• Like roleplay, collaborative stories, and village life  
• Prefer a stable and fast modded client  
• Want vanilla Minecraft with a cleaner, smoother and more modern feel

------------------------------------------------------------

**Join the Community and Build Your Own Village Story**

------------------------------------------------------------
